title: AssassinContracts
description: AssassinContracts lets players anonymously place hit contracts on others, rewarding successful kills with gold, loot, or cosmetics. It’s a stealthy, command-driven system built for PvP and roleplay servers — no GUI, just pure underground bounty hunting.
body:
AssassinContracts is a Minecraft plugin that allows players to anonymously place hit contracts on other players. Assassins receive these contracts in secret and are rewarded with money, loot, or other server-defined rewards upon a successful kill. All interactions are handled through simple commands—no menus or GUIs—making it lightweight and easy to use in PvP or roleplay-focused servers.

This plugin is ideal for adding stealth, danger, and player-driven conflict to your world. It encourages strategy, betrayal, and bounty hunting while keeping things fair through built-in protections like cooldowns and IP checks. A live contract list and PlaceholderAPI support make tracking and integrating contracts easy.

You need Vault for economy support. PlaceholderAPI is optional but recommended. Built for Paper 1.21.4.
